questions.question: Who was Mahendra?
questions.answer: Mahendra was a junior supervisor who worked at different construction sites.

questions.question: Who was Iswaran?
questions.answer: Iswaran was Mahendra’s cook and loyal companion.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra have to move frequently?
questions.answer: Mahendra had to move frequently because his job required him to supervise work at different construction sites.

questions.question: What special talent did Iswaran have?
questions.answer: Iswaran had the talent of telling interesting and imaginative stories.

questions.question: What type of books did Iswaran read?
questions.answer: Iswaran read popular Tamil thriller books.

questions.question: How did Iswaran describe a fallen tree on the road?
questions.answer: He described it dramatically as a large bushy beast lying across the road.

questions.question: What animal did Iswaran describe in his story?
questions.answer: He described a mad elephant in his story.

questions.question: How did Iswaran claim to stop the elephant?
questions.answer: He claimed that he struck the elephant’s toenail with a stick and it collapsed.

questions.question: What martial art did Iswaran mention?
questions.answer: He mentioned karate or jujitsu.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra enjoy listening to Iswaran’s stories?
questions.answer: Mahendra enjoyed them because they were exciting and entertaining.

questions.question: Why did Iswaran prepare a special dinner one night?
questions.answer: He prepared it because it was an auspicious day for feeding the spirits of ancestors.

questions.question: What did Iswaran say about the factory area?
questions.answer: He said the factory area was once a burial ground.

questions.question: What ghost did Iswaran describe?
questions.answer: He described a female ghost holding a foetus.

questions.question: How did Mahendra react to the ghost story at first?
questions.answer: Mahendra dismissed it and said ghosts were imaginary.

questions.question: When did the ghost appear according to Iswaran?
questions.answer: According to Iswaran, the ghost appeared on full-moon nights.

questions.question: What sound woke Mahendra one night?
questions.answer: A low moaning sound woke Mahendra at night.

questions.question: What did Mahendra see outside the window?
questions.answer: He saw a dark cloudy figure outside the window.

questions.question: How did Mahendra feel after seeing the figure?
questions.answer: He became frightened and broke into a cold sweat.

questions.question: What explanation did Mahendra give to himself?
questions.answer: He thought it might be a trick played by his imagination.

questions.question: What did Iswaran say the next morning?
questions.answer: He said Mahendra had seen the female ghost.

questions.question: How did Mahendra react to Iswaran’s statement?
questions.answer: Mahendra felt a chill of fear down his spine.

questions.question: What decision did Mahendra make after the incident?
questions.answer: He decided to resign and leave the place.

questions.question: Why was Iswaran considered an asset to Mahendra?
questions.answer: He cooked for Mahendra and entertained him with interesting stories.

questions.question: What quality made Iswaran a fascinating storyteller?
questions.answer: His imagination and dramatic narration made him fascinating.

questions.question: What message does the story convey?
questions.answer: The story shows that imagination and suggestion can strongly influence human thoughts.
